Intro Hotels My Bookings Admin Help
Curated stays Pay at hotel Instant receipt

Book a luxury escape. Five hotels, three room tiers, one smooth experience.

Explore immersive properties—from minimalist city suites to ultra-premium skyline penthouses. Create an account, choose your stay, and receive a professional receipt instantly. Admin approval workflow included.

What you get
Services & Standards
Nocturne Promise
Quiet Rooms
Acoustic glazing + blackout
Smart Check-in
Fast desk & digital ID
Premium Linen
300-thread-count bedding
Safety First
Verified partners & policies
Tip: Book your stay, then manage requests from My Bookings.

Rooms, designed for the Noir Aesthetic

Three tiers across all hotels: Standard (clean), Deluxe (bigger), Suite (statement). Transparent pricing and instant receipts.

Compare hotels →
Standard
Best value
  • • Queen bed, rainfall shower
  • • Desk, blackout curtains
  • • High-speed Wi‑Fi
Deluxe
Room to breathe
  • • Bigger layout + seating
  • • City-view or pool-view
  • • Priority check-in
Suite
Iconic
  • • Separate lounge + minibar
  • • Concierge + late checkout
  • • Best-view guarantee
Included in every stay

Amenities

A consistent standard, upgraded per hotel tier.

Spa & Sauna
Infinity Pool
Gym
Restaurant
Airport pickup
Concierge
Signature services

Concierge that actually helps

From late checkouts and room preferences to city plans and transfers — your requests are tracked inside your booking receipt and visible to admin for approval.

Flexible requests
Extra pillows, quiet floor, anniversary note
Transparent policy
Pay at hotel • Verify at check-in
Choose a hotel FAQs & policies

Reviews

Realistic, detailed feedback—what a professional hotel page should show.

"Immaculate"
Suite • 3 nights

The lighting, textures, and silence were perfect. Check-in was smooth, and the receipt had every detail. Paid at the hotel with zero friction.

— Ayesha K.
"Worth it"
Deluxe • 2 nights

Loved the lounge and the spa. The staff honored our late checkout request after admin approval. Would book again.

— Hamza R.
"Great value"
Standard • 1 night

Clean room, fast Wi‑Fi, and the dark theme is gorgeous. Booking flow felt like a real system.

— Zain M.
Location

In the heart of the city (and beyond)

Each property lists a clear location, nearby highlights, and transport access. Select a hotel to see its details and room options.

Airport transfer
Available at most locations (request in booking)
Nearby landmarks
Museums, restaurants, skyline points
Walkable districts Secure parking Quiet floors
Select a hotel to see its specific address and highlights.

Secure access

Login

Users must login before booking. Admin login unlocks the dashboard.

Create an account →
Admin credentials
Admin: admin@nocturne.stays / Admin@2467
Users can create an account from Register.
Why login?

Bookings need identity

We capture your name and email for your receipt and allow admin approval for booking confirmation.

Instant receipt PDF-style
Booking statuses
Admin approve/decline
My Bookings history
Security note

Account security

Use a strong password and keep your login details private. Your account is used for bookings and receipts.

View policies →
Create account

Register

Create a user account to book rooms and view receipts. Admin accounts are separate.

Register
Email + password
2
Login
Required before booking

Pay at hotel
Nocturne ID

Your profile, your receipts

By registering, you agree to pay at hotel and allow admin verification at check-in.
Already have an account? Login →
Booking

Reserve your room

Fill in details to generate your receipt. Payment is done at the hotel.

Status
Pending admin approval
Estimated total
PKR —
Paid at hotel. Receipt includes all details.
Booking summary

Your stay at a glance

Policy

Pay at hotel

We don’t take payment online. Your room is reserved and marked as Pending until an admin approves it.

ID required at check-in
Refund rules vary per hotel

My Bookings

View receipts, statuses, and history. Only visible when logged in as a user.

Book another stay
Tips

Manage smoothly

  • • Pending bookings need admin approval.
  • • Your receipt contains booking ID and policy note.
  • • If declined, you can rebook a different date/tier.

Admin Dashboard

Review all bookings, then approve or decline. (Admin-only.)

Overview

Bookings

Total
0
Pending
0
Approved
0
Declined
0
Admin actions update booking statuses instantly.
Filters

Status

Queue
All booking requests
Help

Policies & Support

Find booking policies, check-in rules, and support information. For questions, contact the front desk of your selected hotel.

Booking policy

  • • Your booking is created with status Pending until admin approval.
  • • Please bring a valid ID for verification at check-in.
  • • Payment is done at the hotel reception at check-in or checkout (hotel policy).

Check-in & check-out

Standard check-in
2:00 PM
Standard check-out
12:00 PM
Late checkout
On request
Subject to availability
Cancellation
Varies by hotel
Ask reception for details

FAQs

Do I need an account to book?
Yes. Login is required so your receipt and booking history are saved.
How do I see my receipt again?
Go to My Bookings and open the receipt.
When is my booking confirmed?
After admin approval. The status updates automatically in your booking list.
Nocturne Stays

Luxury hotel bookings with instant receipts and admin approval workflow.
